text.title: Dormant Lead Reactivation Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree routes by segment + jurisdiction + consent age to one of three sequence variants; each leaf cites a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions met (pipeline tracked, ≥30 dormants, consent recorded)?

conclusion.verdict: touch 1 = consent re-confirmation; offers begin earliest at touch 2 after opt-in
3-touch sequence: reference past project → value offer → polite close
3-touch sequence: reference prior proposal → counter the lost-reason → close
3-touch nurture: signal-based opener → educational asset → quarterly review opt-in

text.example: precond=true → segment=past-client → stale_consent=true → consent-reconfirm-first-touch → touch 1 is re-confirmation, not offer.
